hero.subtitle: Report lost & found items, let Gemini AI match them intelligently, claim ownership and reunite with your belongings — all in one place.

how.title: Three steps to reunion
how.subtitle: Khoj is designed to get your belongings back as fast as possible.
how.step1_desc: Lost something? Found something? Post it in seconds — add a photo, location, date, and contact info.
how.step2_desc: Browse the live database or let our Gemini-powered AI search understand what you're looking for — even in natural language.
how.step3_desc: Found a match? Send a claim request. The poster reviews it and accepts — marking the item as officially resolved.

ai_spotlight.body: Type exactly what happened — "I lost my black backpack near the TSC canteen on Tuesday evening" — and Gemini understands the context, location, and time to surface the best matches from the entire database.
ai_spotlight.bullet1: Proactive Smart Suggestions — we find matches before you search
ai_spotlight.bullet2: Semantic Search — natural language, not just keywords
ai_spotlight.bullet4: Results cached intelligently for blazing speed

features.title: Intelligent & Secure
features.subtitle: Advanced AI matching combined with trusted community moderation ensures fast, safe recoveries.
features.f1_desc: Advanced Gemini AI engine intelligently matches lost and found items, understanding context, location, and descriptions to surface relevant results instantly.
features.f2_desc: Built-in reporting system with dedicated admin review. Suspected fraud or inappropriate listings are investigated and struck to maintain community trust.
features.f3_desc: Optimized for speed with secure authentication, encrypted communications, and verified user profiles to ensure safe transactions and quick reunions.

stories.title: Reunited with their belongings
stories.subtitle: Real stories from real people who recovered their lost items through Khoj.
stories.story1: Lost my MacBook, thought it was gone forever. Khoj's AI found it within 2 hours. Amazing service!
stories.story2: Found someone's important documents here. The community helped me return them. Love this!
stories.story3: My heirloom ring was missing for weeks. Found it through a perfect AI match. Grateful forever!

faq.title: Questions? We have answers.
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Khoj and how it works.
faq.a1: Yes! Khoj is completely free. Post items, search, and communicate with other users at no cost. We believe in making lost & found accessible to everyone.
faq.q2: How does the AI matching work?
faq.a2: Our Gemini AI analyzes descriptions, locations, dates, and images to find the best matches. It understands context and can match items even with vague descriptions.
faq.a3: We use bank-level encryption for all data. Personal information is only visible to verified users, and you control what you share.
faq.q4: How long does it take to recover an item?
faq.a4: Recovery times vary, but our users report average resolution times of 3-7 days. Some items are recovered within hours!

cta_final.subtitle: Join thousands of users already using Khoj. Post, search, and recover lost items with AI-powered matching.
cta_final.footnote: No credit card required • Powered by Gemini AI

footer.tagline: Built with ❤️ by the Khoj team • Powered by Gemini AI

register.title: Register
register.subtitle: Create a new Khoj account to join the community and start recovering lost items.
register.join_sub: Become a member to report lost items, claim found belongings, and help build a trustworthy network.
register.err_email_fmt: Please enter a valid email address containing @ and .
register.err_phone_num: Phone number must contain only numbers.
register.err_password_rules: Password must be at least 6 characters long and contain at least 1 uppercase, 1 lowercase, 1 number, and 1 special character.
register.err_cloudinary: Failed to upload image to Cloudinary.

about_page.title: Meet the Khoj Team.
about_page.tagline: Building communities, one lost item at a time.
about_page.mission_body: Khoj is a dedicated platform designed to help individuals find their lost belongings and assist those who have found items in returning them to their rightful owners. We believe that by creating an accessible and easy-to-use platform, we can increase the chances of happy reunions between people and their cherished possessions.
about_page.dev1_desc: Passionate about learning modern web technologies and coordinating team efforts to build meaningful projects.
about_page.dev2_desc: Focused on learning database management and building the logic that powers web applications.
about_page.dev3_desc: Enthusiastic about creating clean user interfaces and bringing designs to life with code.
